# ofl

`github.com/lnorton89/golc/internal/fixture/ofl`

Package ofl implements the Open Fixture Library import path
(FIXT-03/FIXT-06, CONTEXT D-06/D-08): fetch.go is an SSRF-guarded
(threat T-02-06), cache-backed client that validates a target URL's
scheme and host before issuing a fixed-timeout, size-capped GET, and
normalize.go maps the fetched definition's channel/capability shape onto
GOLC's canonical fixture.FixtureDefinition through the exact same
validation and pinning pipeline the hand-authored YAML path uses.
Anything the v1 canonical model cannot represent becomes an explicit
fixture.LossyImportWarning on the result's Provenance rather than being
dropped silently or rejected outright.
